system.description: You use your blade to write your initials, slash off an enemy’s mustache, put out a candle, or some other impressive act. If you are targeting an object, the total difficulty must be -4 or greater to be sufficiently impressive. If you succeed in tagging a person they must Yield Advantage or lose 1 Composure. If you tag an object, any opponents engaged in combat with you (or intending to be) are awestruck and must spend a Minor Action to recover.
system.mastery: Bonus Die to Tag, +1 to avoid Tag Maneuvers
